title: drynaria heracleum
intro: Drynaria heracleum, also known as Chinese ti, is a type of plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Drynaria heracleum include improving immune function, reducing inflammation, and treating various conditions such as arthritis, gout, and even cancer. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
